title: 5 Reasons to Attend Trailblazing Women India
author: Salesforce Careers

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Mark your calendars for Friday, August 23 because Salesforce is — drumroll, please — bringing itsannual Trailblazing Women Summit back to India for the second time! Featuring unforgettable business executives and speakers, you won’t want miss out as we ignite innovation, discuss AI transformation, and break down barriers with powerful women and allies from all around the globe. Not convinced? Take a look atlast year’s Trailblazing Women India— streamed by over two million! — to get inspired and excited for this year’s event.➡️Register nowto attend Trailblazing Women Summit India!

sections.heading: Still not sure? Here are 5 reasons to attend:
sections.text: Powerful business leaders, inspiring celebrity speakers, unforgettable women and allies, and, of course, you. At Trailblazing Women: Igniting Innovation, you’ll hear from leading women across India who have blazed their career trails and have ignited innovation in their respective fields. Plus, you’ll also be joined by top Salesforce executives, including our host for the day,Arundhati Bhattacharya—Salesforce India CEO and one of Forbes’ World’s 100 Most Powerful Women.Get ready to be inspired! There are two words on every body’s mind: artificial intelligence. How does this technology impact our workforce? How can we ensure that gender and inclusion are at the forefront of these decisions? And how can we upskill to grow our careers?Throughout Trailblazing Women: Igniting Innovation, leaders will discuss the implications of AI — especially large language models and generative AI — and highlight how we can all leverage these technologies to create a foundation of success in your career and within your business. And there’s more innovation in store. After a series of panel discussions with business leaders, we’ll welcome to the stage Arundhati Bhattacharya, Salesforce India CEO,andour secret keynote speaker. Together, they’ll address hard-hitting topics that impact us all, like resilience through change, trust, leadership, and inclusivity. Trailblazing Women celebrates those who champion diversity and inclusion in their workplaces, industries, and communities. You’ll have the opportunity to engage with fellow attendees virtually — building connections, sharing experiences, and learning from those who are invested in driving change for workplace equality. While the summit takes place at the Salesforce Hyderabad office, it will also be streamed live all around the globe. Last year, more than two million tuned in to our incredible conversations — can I count you in for this year? The event is over, but it’s coming back in 2025!. We’re looking forward to you joining us next year for our most empowering summit yet — stay tuned!

existing_ctas.heading: Blaze your trail to Salesforce!
existing_ctas.body: At Salesforce, we’re not just shaping the future. We’re turning big ideas into breakthroughs. Want to join the #1 AI CRM that’s leading the digital labor revolution? Explore our open roles today!

existing_ctas.heading: We can’t wait to meet you!
existing_ctas.body: Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.

raw_html:
Mark your calendars for Friday, August 23 because Salesforce is — drumroll, please — bringing its annual Trailblazing Women Summit back to India for the second time!

Featuring unforgettable business executives and speakers, you won’t want miss out as we ignite innovation, discuss AI transformation, and break down barriers with powerful women and allies from all around the globe.

Not convinced? Take a look at last year’s Trailblazing Women India — streamed by over two million! — to get inspired and excited for this year’s event.

➡️ Register now to attend Trailblazing Women Summit India!

Blaze your trail to Salesforce!

At Salesforce, we’re not just shaping the future. We’re turning big ideas into breakthroughs. Want to join the #1 AI CRM that’s leading the digital labor revolution? Explore our open roles today!

Apply now

Still not sure? Here are 5 reasons to attend:

1. A remarkable lineup of … well … trailblazing women!

Powerful business leaders, inspiring celebrity speakers, unforgettable women and allies, and, of course, you. At Trailblazing Women: Igniting Innovation, you’ll hear from leading women across India who have blazed their career trails and have ignited innovation in their respective fields.

Plus, you’ll also be joined by top Salesforce executives, including our host for the day, Arundhati Bhattacharya — Salesforce India CEO and one of Forbes’ World’s 100 Most Powerful Women. Get ready to be inspired!

2. A deep dive into AI and emerging technologies

There are two words on every body’s mind: artificial intelligence. How does this technology impact our workforce? How can we ensure that gender and inclusion are at the forefront of these decisions? And how can we upskill to grow our careers?

Throughout Trailblazing Women: Igniting Innovation, leaders will discuss the implications of AI — especially large language models and generative AI — and highlight how we can all leverage these technologies to create a foundation of success in your career and within your business.

3. A fireside chat with Arundhati Bhattacharya and our award-winning Keynote Speaker

And there’s more innovation in store. After a series of panel discussions with business leaders, we’ll welcome to the stage Arundhati Bhattacharya, Salesforce India CEO, and our secret keynote speaker. Together, they’ll address hard-hitting topics that impact us all, like resilience through change, trust, leadership, and inclusivity.

4. Find community and advocacy with other attendees

Trailblazing Women celebrates those who champion diversity and inclusion in their workplaces, industries, and communities. You’ll have the opportunity to engage with fellow attendees virtually — building connections, sharing experiences, and learning from those who are invested in driving change for workplace equality.

5. Join the summit from anywhere in the world

While the summit takes place at the Salesforce Hyderabad office, it will also be streamed live all around the globe. Last year, more than two million tuned in to our incredible conversations — can I count you in for this year?

The event is over, but it’s coming back in 2025!. We’re looking forward to you joining us next year for our most empowering summit yet — stay tuned!

We can’t wait to meet you!

Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.

Join today
